name: Credit Recovery Validate
script:
# NOT a standalone script — this is the body of a Server Script record
# (Script Type: DocType Event, Reference: Credit Recovery, Event: Before Save).
# Runs in Frappe's restricted safe-exec sandbox; only whitelisted methods used
# (frappe.utils, frappe.db.get_value, frappe.get_all, frappe.throw, _).

# 1. Days Outstanding — authoritative server-side calculation.
if doc.oldest_invoice_date:
    doc.days_outstanding = frappe.utils.date_diff(frappe.utils.nowdate(), doc.oldest_invoice_date) or 0
else:
    doc.days_outstanding = 0

# 2. Lock records already marked Paid — only administrators may modify.
#    The form client script only disables the UI; this is the real enforcement
#    (covers REST API, bulk edit and data import paths too).
if not doc.is_new():
    previous_status = frappe.db.get_value("Credit Recovery", doc.name, "recovery_status")
    if previous_status == "Paid":
        user = frappe.session.user
        is_admin = user == "Administrator" or frappe.get_all(
            "Has Role",
            filters={"parent": user, "parenttype": "User", "role": "System Manager"},
            limit=1,
        )
        if not is_admin:
            frappe.throw(_("This Credit Recovery record is marked Paid and locked. Only an administrator can modify it."))

# 3. Stamp / clear Paid On (drives the "Recovery This Month" number card).
if doc.recovery_status == "Paid" and not doc.paid_on:
    doc.paid_on = frappe.utils.nowdate()
if doc.recovery_status != "Paid" and doc.paid_on:
    doc.paid_on = None

name: Credit Recovery Daily Refresh
script:
# NOT a standalone script — this is the body of a Server Script record
# (Script Type: Scheduler Event, Frequency: Daily).
# Keeps Days Outstanding current on open records without anyone editing them,
# so list view sorting/filtering by age stays truthful. Paid records are left
# untouched. Uses doc.db_set with update_modified=False so the daily refresh
# does not churn the modified timestamp or version log.

today = frappe.utils.nowdate()
rows = frappe.get_all(
    "Credit Recovery",
    filters={
        "recovery_status": ["!=", "Paid"],
        "oldest_invoice_date": ["is", "set"],
    },
    fields=["name", "oldest_invoice_date", "days_outstanding"],
    limit_page_length=0,
)
for row in rows:
    days = frappe.utils.date_diff(today, row.oldest_invoice_date) or 0
    if days != row.days_outstanding:
        record = frappe.get_doc("Credit Recovery", row.name)
        record.db_set("days_outstanding", days, update_modified=False)
